description: Liyanage Shanthapriya Wijesuriya Vs. Commission to Investigate Allegations of Bribery or Corruption before Hon. Amal Ranaraja, J.
parties: Liyanage Shanthapriya Wijesuriya Vs. Commission to Investigate Allegations of Bribery or Corruption
keywords: Bribery Act- Aggravating and Mitigating circumstances
legistation: - Section 16(b) of the Bribery Act (as amended). - Section 19(c) of the Bribery Act (as amended). - Sections 113(b) and 102 read with Section 403 of the Penal Code of Sri Lanka.
